data.body:
It’s depressing to listen to the UCP and their acolytes. 

That’s why I don’t. 

The other day I was having a conversation with a kindly old guy I’ve seen around the neighbourhood. Out of nowhere he went off on immigrants, Trudeau, Carney and on and on. 

I bluntly said, we can’t talk anymore. Bye.
